utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Check full specification: Each of the first three (health, property, travel) includes a plan name, details, and cost—thus fully specified. Additional_services should include any enhancement services with costs; the plan notes services but explicitly states no separate costs—this lacks the required costs detail, so not fully specified. Total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; both monthly and annual costs are provided—fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three items by name: New Partner Benefits Package from ConsultingPro (health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel). From the ground-truth ratings list, only EliteHome Premium Coverage and EliteTravel Premium Plan have corresponding entries with ratings. The 'New Partner Benefits Package from ConsultingPro' does not appear in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be mapped to a rating.
